docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WON, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT KEES, CHARLIE DBA SEGWAY SF BAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-24-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-26-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF ROBIN WON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLIE KEES IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 1-23-2023 IS 4 DAYS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT AT FIRST DOES NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE BUT LATER CHANGE HIS MIND TO WAIVE SERVICE TO PROCEED TO TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE CHARGED SERVED DEC-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEES, CHARLIE DBA SEGWAY SF BAY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WON, ROBIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KEES, CHARLIE DBA SEGWAY SF BAY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
